# layermark-starter — Index for AI Agents

Claude Code project bootstrap scaffold for **regulated-domain founder**
projects: TR/non-English wizard, risk-tiered category system (10 categories,
HIGH-RISK auto-elevation for finance/legal), doctrine library distilled
from Pocock + AI Engineer + Anthropic Engineering.

Use this file to find what to read first when working on this scaffold.
Every entry is a real file — no fabricated paths.

## Top-level entry points

setup_starter.py
  Interactive bootstrap. 11-step wizard (Phase 0 → 4): language pick (10
  langs), project name, category, stack, intel pipeline, knowledge base,
  Phase 0.6 prompt-engineer mode, Phase 0.7 risk profile. Renders template/
  into a new user project on Desktop.
  Triggers: setup, wizard, bootstrap, new project, scaffold start.

CLAUDE.md.tmpl (in template/)
  Source of the user-project CLAUDE.md. Every projet a copy. Top has
  <!-- BEGIN: first-run onboarding --> directive — Claude reads, asks
  remaining wizard questions, then deletes the block.
  Triggers: project guide, wizard continuation, first-run, onboarding.

scripts/install_devops.sh
  Opt-in DevOps installer. 7 patterns Y/N: pre-commit hook, GitHub Actions
  smoke, deploy-failure alert, weekly project-advisor cron, drift detection
  (KB-only), daily intel cron, eval CI gate (production only).
  Triggers: pre-commit, CI gate, deploy alert, cron, drift, eval pipeline.

scripts/import_skill.py
  External skill importer. Accepts GitHub URL, validates frontmatter, audits
  for security keywords, logs to IMPORTED.md with provenance. Aggregator
  escape hatch — keeps curated 15-set wedge while letting users pull from
  antigravity (1,445 skills) etc. on demand.
  Triggers: import skill, third-party skill, skill marketplace.

tests/smoke_test.py
  5 scenarios + TTFF gate (<15s). Tests: assistant+automation, blank+
  general, assistant+finance HIGH-RISK, prompt-engineer mode toggles,
  legal+legal-disclaimer-checker. CI gate via .github/workflows/smoke.yml.
  Triggers: smoke test, CI, regression check, TTFF.

## Doctrine corpus (template/02-memory/doctrine/)

5 production doctrines auto-loaded on HIGH-RISK categories (finance, legal):

auto-mode-classifier.md
  Anthropic Engineering 2026-05 — input prompt-injection probe + output
  transcript classifier (Sonnet 4.6). 17% FNR for overeager actions.
  Triggers: auto-mode, classifier, prompt injection, security gate.

brain-hands-decoupling.md
  Anthropic Engineering 2026-05 — stateless brain (harness) + hands (tool
  interface) + session (durable log). Hot-swap tools without harness
  restart.
  Triggers: brain hands, decoupling, harness, tool interface, durable session.

eval-awareness.md
  Anthropic Engineering 2026-05 — Opus 4.6 BrowseComp solved benchmark via
  XOR decryption + benchmark-ID inference. Eval-aware agents need canary
  strings, credential gates, network isolation.
  Triggers: eval awareness, canary string, benchmark contamination.

multi-grader-eval.md
  Anthropic Engineering 2026-05 — outcome (50%) + transcript (30%) +
  human-stub (20%) rubric. Single-score eval insufficient for production.
  Triggers: multi-grader, eval rubric, outcome transcript human.

red-team-primitive.md
  Anthropic Engineering 2026-05 — Project Vend agent identity hallucination
  + discount scams. Pre-deployment red-team checklist + continuous canary +
  red-team skill.
  Triggers: red team, project vend, agent hallucination, identity scam.

## Category boilerplates (template/02-memory/category/)

10 category files (01-10), one auto-loaded per project based on Phase 0.3
answer. Each has 5-10 patterns + risk profile + sample prompt + anti-
patterns. HIGH-RISK ones (06-finance, 07-legal) trigger production
doctrine + agent-approval gate + category-aware deny rules.

## Agents (template/.claude/agents/)

prompt-engineer.md
  Three-mode doctrine agent. (1) BUILD: casual request → structured prompt.
  (2) AUDIT: doctrine violation finder + always-on security pass (hardcoded
  secrets, command injection, SSRF, path traversal). (3) PREMORTEM: Kahneman
  anti-bias plan stress-test (explicit-only trigger).
  Triggers: prompt engineering, build, audit, premortem, security audit.

finance-auditor.md (HIGH-RISK only)
  5 atomic checks: Decimal usage, double-entry, immutable ledger,
  idempotency, transaction boundary. Copied only when category=finance.
  Triggers: finance audit, ledger, decimal, double entry.

legal-disclaimer-checker.md (HIGH-RISK only)
  5 atomic checks: disclaimer presence, jurisdiction citation, PII
  handling, regulation citation, no-absolute-claims. Copied only when
  category=legal.
  Triggers: legal review, disclaimer, jurisdiction, PII, KVKK, GDPR.

## Skills (template/.claude/skills/) — 15 curated

grill-me, skill-creator, agent-creator, project-advisor, yardim, suspend,
resume, sync-drift, ne-yapayim, spagetti-check, ubiquitous-language,
failing-test-as-prompt, agent-approval, verify-agent-output, premortem.

Each passes the inner-loop test (Pocock #9 — rules emerge from friction).
Decision tree: template/.claude/skills/README.md.

## Hooks (template/.claude/hooks/)

activity_tracker.py (PostToolUse)
  Logs every Edit/Write to data/activity.jsonl. Memento doctrine —
  written evidence > recall.
  Triggers: activity log, edit tracker, post-tool-use hook.

session_snapshot.py (Stop)
  Session-end summary. Counts edits, summarizes commits, appends entry to
  02-memory/decisions-log.md.
  Triggers: session end, snapshot, stop hook, decisions log.

## Settings (template/.claude/settings.json.tmpl)

7 standard deny rules + category-aware extras. Finance: pickle.load,
float-money, ledger overwrite. Legal: plaintext HTTP, ssn/tckn keywords,
PII writes. Hooks block registered (PostToolUse + Stop).

## DevOps doctrine (template/02-memory/doctrine/)

build-failure-prevention.md — 3-layer system (PREVENT pre-commit + DETECT
CI + AUTO-FIX research). Origin: 2026-05-05 incident, 3 silent deploy
failures from unescaped backtick.

devops-patterns.md — 7-pattern catalog opt-in via install_devops.sh.
Each pattern: friction it solves, what it does, cost, when to install,
anti-patterns.

## Key user-facing pages (site/app/)

site/app/why/page.tsx — wedge defense + competitor matrix + ecosystem
links + 60-sec at-a-glance. Updated 2026-05-06.

site/app/start/page.tsx — /start prompt for users. Step 0 = language
pick (10 langs), then prereq + ZIP-first download + setup_starter.py.

## Wedge / lane statement

layermark-starter is **NOT** a horizontal Claude Code starter (lose to
ECC 174K★ on every axis). Lane: **TR/non-English regulated-domain
founder bootstrap**. Wedge holds on:
- 10-language non-tech wizard (no other competitor ships this)
- Risk-tiered category → auto-doctrine wiring (architectural, not flat)
- Cited doctrine corpus (Pocock + AI Engineer + Anthropic Engineering)
- Curated 15 skill set + import_skill.py (curation > catalog)
- 3-mode prompt-engineer (BUILD/AUDIT/PREMORTEM unified)

## Last updated

2026-05-06 (after PREMORTEM mode + ecosystem section + at-a-glance table).
